text.title: mr-renovate-ai-handoff Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for mr-renovate-ai-handoff as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Routing every bump (patch, minor, major) through the AI agent "for safety".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Burns agent tokens on the deterministic 90%, slows the pipeline, and increases the surface for prompt-injection attacks via release notes.
